introSection: Nightmare was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Joyland in Wichita, Kansas, USA. The ride was previously known as Roller Coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Nightmare closed on August 14, 2004 but was not demolished until 2015.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: A 35-year-old park employee was killed by the ride on August 27, 1998.

fullText:
Nightmare was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Joyland in Wichita, Kansas, USA. The ride was previously known as Roller Coaster.

Nightmare closed on August 14, 2004 but was not demolished until 2015.

A 35-year-old park employee was killed by the ride on August 27, 1998.
